statements.statement: MATCH (u:User {id: 5}) CALL { WITH u WITH u WHERE u.embedding IS NOT NULL CALL db.index.vector.queryNodes('job_embedding', 3000, u.embedding) YIELD node AS vj, score AS vScore RETURN collect({id: id(vj), score: vScore}) AS vScores } OPTIONAL MATCH (u)-[:HAS_SKILL]->(s:Skill)<-[:REQUIRES_SKILL]-(j:Job) WHERE NOT j.title CONTAINS '국비' AND NOT j.title CONTAINS '교육과정'  WITH DISTINCT j, u, count(s) AS graphScore, vScores LIMIT 3000 WITH j, u, graphScore, [vs IN vScores WHERE vs.id = id(j) | vs.score] AS matchedScore WITH j, u, graphScore, CASE WHEN size(matchedScore) > 0 THEN matchedScore[0] ELSE 0.0 END AS rawVScore RETURN count(j)
